input_or_scenario: Replay saved run and query SPY — top ticker by post count (35 posts) low_sample=False
expected_behavior: Full ticker report renders across all six sections: Sentiment Summary Emotion Breakdown Post Type Breakdown Monthly Timeline Top Key Insights Rumour Alerts. No crash. No missing sections.
actual_behavior: SPY report rendered correctly across all six sections. 35 posts 5 post types 11 emotion categories monthly timeline 3 top insights with direct Reddit permalinks 2 rumour alerts with disclaimer. No crash or KeyError.
notes: Baseline happy path — confirms the full output pipeline works on the top ticker

input_or_scenario: Inspect SPY and TSLA reports from saved run. Both tickers have sarcasm_rate > 10%.
expected_behavior: High sarcasm rate warning displayed in report header. Sarcastic posts labelled [SARCASTIC] in Top Key Insights. Claude assigns lower confidence to sarcastic posts than straightforward ones.
actual_behavior: SPY: 14/35 posts sarcastic (40%) — warning triggered. TSLA: 4/8 posts sarcastic (50%) — warning triggered. [SARCASTIC] label present in insights. Sarcastic posts show lower confidence (e.g. SPY meme post: conf=0.30 vs DD post: conf=0.70).
notes: High sarcasm rate consistent with r/wallstreetbets behaviour during April 2026 market downturn

input_or_scenario: Inspect TSLA report from saved run. avg_confidence=0.51 below LOW_CONF_THRESHOLD=0.60.
expected_behavior: LOW CONFIDENCE warning displayed at top of report. Report still renders fully. No crash.
actual_behavior: TSLA report displays LOW CONFIDENCE at header. Report rendered fully across all sections. avg_confidence=0.51 driven by high meme/sarcasm volume.
notes: JPMorgan warning post at conf=0.85 offset by three meme posts at conf=0.40 — shows correct per-post scoring

input_or_scenario: Inspect DPZ (Dominos) entry from ticker_summary. Highest engagement score in dataset at 9656.8.
expected_behavior: Claude assigns market_relevance < 0.4 and confidence < 0.5. low_confidence flag set True. Post should not distort overall pipeline results.
actual_behavior: DPZ: avg_engagement=9656.8 (highest in dataset) avg_confidence=0.20 avg_relevance=0.10 low_confidence=True. DPZ does not appear in top-3 tickers so no full report generated.
notes: Viral meme post with 123150 upvotes correctly identified as low-signal despite high engagement

input_or_scenario: Inspect rumour_alerts.csv and SPY report from saved run.
expected_behavior: Posts with is_rumour=True and rumour_confidence >= 0.70 appear in rumour_alerts.csv. Rumour Alerts section renders in relevant ticker report with type summary confidence and source link. Disclaimer displayed.
actual_behavior: 3 posts flagged: Trump-Iran ceasefire (conf=0.80 type=regulatory_decision) Iran missile salvo (conf=0.70) OpenAI/Anthropic/SpaceX IPO bypass (conf=0.70). All in rumour_alerts.csv and SPY report. Disclaimer shown per alert.
notes: Two-track routing confirmed — rumours separated from ticker sentiment aggregate

input_or_scenario: Run python main.py --replay with no argument (auto-selects most recent run).
expected_behavior: Pipeline skips agents 1-4. Loads CSVs from most recent run. Renders all three reports. No API calls. Completes in seconds.
actual_behavior: Replay printed replaying run_20260412_110302 and rendered all three reports without API calls. emotions and tickers columns correctly restored via ast.literal_eval. Runtime under 5 seconds.
notes: Critical path for graders — no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY required

input_or_scenario: Call query_ticker(XYZ ...) against saved outputs where XYZ is not in ticker_summary.
expected_behavior: Output Agent prints No data found for $XYZ and lists available tickers. No crash. No KeyError.
actual_behavior: Output Agent printed No data found for $XYZ. followed by Available tickers: [list of 59 tickers]. Returns immediately. No exception raised.
evidence_or_citation: eval/case_outputs/TC-07_query_miss.txt; agents/output_agent.py — ticker not found guard at top of query_ticker()
notes: Verifies graceful degradation on invalid user input

input_or_scenario: Set MIN_POST_SCORE=100000 in config.py and run full pipeline. No posts have score >= 100000.
expected_behavior: Filter Agent returns empty DataFrame. Pipeline halts after Agent 2. run_metadata.json written with n_filtered=0. No Claude API calls made.
actual_behavior: Pipeline halted after Filter Agent with message Pipeline stopped — no posts survived filtering. run_metadata.json recorded n_filtered=0 n_analyzed=0 errors=0. trace.txt shows Agent 1 and 2 output only — no Agent 3 header.
evidence_or_citation: eval/case_outputs/TC-08_filter_zero_result.txt; main.py lines 64-72 — explicit zero-result check after run_filter()
notes: Confirms the pipeline gate prevents wasteful API calls on empty input

input_or_scenario: Evaluate avg_confidence for SPY (top ticker 35 posts) against target >= 0.75.
notes: April 2026 market downturn produced 49.5% sarcasm rate across dataset. Heavy irony naturally depresses confidence scores. Dataset characteristic not a pipeline failure.

actual_behavior: 283 posts survived filtering (not 500). Pipeline ran for 1120 seconds (~18.7 min). Rate ~3.9s per post.
notes: errors=217 in metadata is misleading — reflects BATCH_SIZE(500) - n_analyzed(283) = 217 not actual API errors. Sentiment Agent reported 0 errors.

input_or_scenario: Run full pipeline and measure filter retention rate against target >= 30%.
expected_behavior: At least 30% of raw posts survive filtering.
notes: 64% of raw posts have deleted bodies. Rule 1 (body OR comments) raised retention from <5% to 18.2%. Lowering MIN_POST_SCORE below 10 risks including low-signal fringe posts.

input_or_scenario: Run full pipeline and count tickers with >= 5 posts.
expected_behavior: At least 10 tickers with >= 5 posts each.
actual_behavior: 3 tickers with >= 5 posts: SPY (35) TSLA (8) TACO (7). 59 tickers total but most have 1-4 posts.
notes: Direct consequence of low filter retention. 283 posts across 59 tickers = avg 4.8 posts per ticker. Larger or multi-week dataset would improve significantly.
